TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Faure_Gnassingbé, title = Faure_Gnassingbé, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Faure_Gnassingbé} }

S.FORM: Faure Gnassingbé ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 6, Faure Gnassingbé, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1966) mrhuw Togo ta' misuw hya' ga Faure Gnassingbé, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Faure Gnassingbé ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 6, Faure Gnassingbé, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1966) mrhuw Togo ta' misuw hya' ga Faure Gnassingbé, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *aure ɣnas~ɕs~ɕiŋβ* rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *aure ɣnas~ɕs~ɕiŋβ*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw toɣo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *aure ɣnas~ɕs~ɕiŋβ*, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
